comments.comment: Began operating a Landfill Gas Flaring system in 2019, so first time reporting emissions from that source. Road dust calculations have annual variation related to the number and types of customer vehicles travelling the unpaved portions of facility roads.

comments.comment: Began operating a Landfill Gas Flaring system in 2019, so first time reporting emissions from that source. Road dust calculations have annual variation related to the number and types of customer vehicles travelling the unpaved portions of facility roads.
The significant decrease between 2015 (285 tonnes) and 2016 (160 tonnes) is related to a large building demolition (the old city yards) that occurred in 2015

comments.comment: As a landfill, customer traffic levels vary, so road dust will vary. Our landfill gas collection and flaring system experienced a couple  extended periods of downtime in 2020, related to equipment or LFG quality issues, which we hope to resolve.

comments.comment: As a landfill, numbers of customers vary each year. 2021 saw a 7.5% increase in customer vehicle traffic on the unpaved portions of the roads, leading to an increase in road dust. As well, we flared more landfill gas in 2021 compared to 2020.

comments.comment: As a landfill, numbers of customers vary each year, and we flared more landfill gas in 2022. As well, we increased activities related to soil and aggregate recycling, resulting in more vehicle traffic.
